memberDid.description: A member specified directly by their DID.

spaceKey.description: The key of the space on this arbiter.

memberLocalSpace.description: A member representing all of the members of another space that is on this arbiter.

arbiterDid.description: The DID of the remote arbiter.

spaceKey.description: The key of the space on the remote arbiter.

memberRemoteSpace.description: A member representing all of the members of another space on another arbiter.
